I] ^ •& Tf^T, Tigw ^ T 1080 Gl/2010 (10 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC, 3(i)] trt? -fenmr:—"TO 1WT srfircjrRT u m^r.ft. 937(30, mm io R H ^ I , 2003 SRT Trot^ rrsm, mmw, 3 u<*>\?m %q;m, $ afa sffim"SMKRu ^ r a f t . 803(3T),fn^sr 9 w r c , 2009 ^ % ^ i ' r a t 1 MINISTRV OF HOME AFFAIRS (Foreigner's Division) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2010 G.S.R. 207(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 18 of the Citizenship Act, 1955 (57 of 1955), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Citizenship (Registra- tion of Qitizens and Issue of National Identity Cards) Rules, 2003, namely:— 1'. (1) These rules may be called the Citizenship (Registration of Citizens and Issue of National Identity Cards) Amendment Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Citizenship (Registration of Citizens and Issue of National Identity Cards) Rules, 2003, (a) the words and figures "electoral rolls prior to the year 1971" wherever they occur, the words figures and letters "electoral rolls upto the midnight of the 24th day of March,1971" shall be substituted; (b) in the Schedule,— (i) in paragraph 1, for clause (b), following clause shall be substituted namely:— '(b) "electoral rolls upto the midnight of the 24th day of March, 1971" means the electoral rolls containing details of voters prepared by the Election Commission of India or the State Election Commission of the State of Assam in a relevant period upto the midnight of the 24th day of March, 1971.* (ii) In paragraph 3, for sub-paragraph (5), the following sub-paragraph be substituted namely:— "(5) The Local Registrar of Citizens Registration may, in respect of a person who— (a) was residing in a place other than the State of Assam upto the midnight of the 24th day of March, 1971; or (b) has shifted from one district to another within the State of Assam up to the midnight of the 24th day of March, 1971, verify information relating to such person through inter-state correspondence, or, as the case may be, through inter-district correspondence." [F.No.260U/01/2009-IC,I] A.K.GOYAL,Jt,Secy, Foot Note:—The principal rules were published in the Gazette ofIndia, Extraordinary vide notification number G.S.R. 937(E), dated the 10th December, 2003 and was last amended vide number G.S.R. 803(E), dated 9thNovember, 2009.
